name: Melanie Malloy
ai_summary: Melanie Malloy of Woodstock, GA brings two years of professional childcare experience working with children ages six months to five years at a building kids facility. She offers part-time availability and handles conflicts by separating children and speaking individually, citing her outgoing, energetic nature and genuine love for children as qualifications.

transcripts.q3: Hi, my name is Melanie Malloy. I have two years experience in the childcare industry with building kids in Roswell. I worked with six months to five year olds. I really enjoy being around children, they bring me joy and happiness and I have a 26 year old son of my own a 27 year old daughter and would really enjoy this opportunity to work with small children. Thank you.
transcripts.q4: I live in Woodstock, Georgia, ZIP, code, 301, 89, and I'm willing to travel up to 30 minutes for shifts.
transcripts.q5: I'm looking for part-time work and my availability is Monday through Friday for the four hour shifts.
transcripts.q6: If I had a conflict between two children, I would separate the children speak with each one of them individually. Probably have to write up a report and take them both up to the director or the front office for further evaluation.
transcripts.q7:
I think I would make a great up kid teacher because I have experience in childcare.
 And very outgoing energetic, thoughtful and kind know how to deal with conflicts between children and just love being around children in general.
